case_title: JULIEN ROBERT VS. KELTON NORMAN GEORGE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ROBERT, JULIEN AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGE, KELTON NORMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2022 - JUDGMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS: RESPONDENT CAME TO SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND WAS SERVED THE DOCUMENTS. SERVED JAN-12-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ROBERT, JULIEN
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GEORGE, KELTON NORMAN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ROBERT, JULIEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-07-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JULIEN ROBERT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KELTON NORMAN GEORGE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $5,794.00 (INCLUDES COST) TO THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT TO PAY BY APPLE PAY. PAYMENT TO BE MADE BY MID-FEBRUARY. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MARCH 07, 2022, HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GEORGE, KELTON NORMAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ROBERT, JULIEN CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN ; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
